meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve can't debug code
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn how to use a SaaS starter kit, Antigravity, and Claude Code to accelerate your development and build professional-grade apps.
content.answer_block: The root cause of debugging paralysis is often an unoptimized, monolithic architecture. By utilizing a modular SaaS starter kit, you enforce strict boundary separation and type safety. Couple this with AI-assisted debugging via Claude Code and Antigravity, and you transform chaotic error logs into actionable, automated refactoring tasks.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen filled with red squiggly lines at 3:00 AM, the cursor blinking like a heartbeat monitor for your dying project. The frustration of being unable to isolate a bug isn't a sign of failure; it’s the threshold of your evolution from a coder to a software architect. You are currently fighting the complexity of your own setup.

The secret that senior engineers won't tell you? We rarely write from scratch. We leverage battle-tested SaaS starter kits that act as a foundation, allowing us to focus on product logic rather than plumbing. By integrating intelligent tooling, you stop chasing phantom bugs and start shipping features that actually work.

steps.title: Initialize the Modular Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your environment using a production-ready starter kit. This eliminates 'it works on my machine' bugs by containerizing your dependencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a modular SaaS architecture including authentication, stripe integration, and standardized error handling middleware.

steps.title: Automate Traceability
steps.description: Inject structured logging into your service layers to make debugging deterministic rather than speculative.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current codebase to implement structured JSON logging across all API endpoints for better observability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --apply 'add winston logger to all controllers'

steps.title: Contextual Bug Isolation
steps.description: Use Claude Code to map dependencies and identify where state corruption is occurring within your data flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the call stack for the current runtime error and identify the specific function where data integrity is lost.
steps.claude_code_command: claude chat 'trace the error in auth.service.ts and suggest a fix'

steps.title: Automated Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Never debug manually again. Force your codebase to prove its correctness through high-coverage unit tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest unit tests for the identified buggy module, covering edge cases including null pointer exceptions.

steps.title: Refactoring via AI Agents
steps.description: Apply a final pass to optimize performance and remove technical debt identified during the debugging phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the codebase to adhere to SOLID principles and optimize database queries for better performance.

pro_tips: Always treat your error logs as data, not noise; filter by severity levels before asking an AI to analyze them.
Use a 'feature flag' approach for new code to isolate bugs to specific modules without breaking the entire build.
If a bug persists, delete the function and ask the AI to rewrite it from scratch based on the desired input/output schema.
Prioritize 'Type-First' development; if your TypeScript definitions are robust, 80% of bugs are caught at compile time.
Keep your Claude Code context window lean by ignoring non-essential assets like images or static documentation.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is stable, deploy your first version to a staging environment and implement automated CI/CD pipelines to catch regressions before they reach your users.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start engineering with precision. Our community is waiting to mentor you through your first production deployment. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
